allow: PowerShell($content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\('C:\\Users\\Gabriel-Dalton\\Documents\\GitHub\\claude-statusline-tokens\\statusline-tokens.ps1', [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $lineNum=0; foreach \($line in \($content -split "`n"\)\) { $lineNum++; for \($i=0; $i -lt $line.Length; $i++\) { $c=[int][char]$line[$i]; if \($c -gt 127\) { "Line ${lineNum} col ${i}: U+{0:X4} '{1}'" -f $c, $line[$i]; break } } })
